name: @orrgal1/forge
description: PR forge chain — fully repo-agnostic, no hard plugin dependency. The restack capability (every CI iteration + on external-block resume) is configurable via /forge-setup [restack]: an installed skill (e.g. @orrgal1/devloop's /restack, recommended when present), a command/instructions, or forge's built-in git fallback. /forge drives start → goals → design → scenarios → tests → impl → proof-green → ci-green → review-green → ci-ready → READY (modes auto | manual | yolo — yolo drives with no contract pauses, stopping only at genuine blockers, via /forge-yolo; resume via /forge approve and /forge iterate). Skills: /forge-setup (maps host-repo tooling into $FORGE_HOME, default ~/.claude/forge/<repo-key>/, so worktrees share state), /forge-start, atoms (/forge-goals, /forge-scenarios, /forge-validations, /forge-tests, /forge-design, /forge-proof, /forge-review), per-layer attestation (/forge-verify-{goals,scenarios,tests,match,runs,validations}), fix-loops (/forge-impl-green, /forge-proof-green, /forge-ci-green — restacks each iteration + runs --until-merge as a continuous background monitor after first green, replacing any final-ci step, /forge-review-green), external-block recognizer (/forge-find-blocker: fan out across gh/Slack/infra to identify a peripheral blocker + emit a condition spec; /forge-wait-for: watch a base PR's CI, a Slack thread, or any predicate, then restack + resume when it clears — auto in yolo/unattended), peer-review watch + reviewer routing (on READY /forge arms /forge-review-watch to auto-address incoming peer feedback and /forge-request-review ranks the best peer reviewer; moving the PR out of draft to ready-for-review + requesting review is a gated author gesture, approval-required even in yolo), domain mapping (/forge-map: db/api/events/config/ad-hoc), multi-channel review (/forge-review: lens-fanout + always-on /code-review + /security-review), tool packaging (/forge-tool). Bundles its own lens pool + review channels (extensible via $FORGE_HOME/; no persona bundled — tiered baseline is the default). Per-PR artifacts under .pr-artifacts/<branch-slug>/forge/.
author: orrgal1
